006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
027
028/**
029 * Specialized writer for serializing YAML.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='note'>
033 *       This class is not intended for external use.
034 * </ul>
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/YamlBasics">YAML Basics</a>
038 * </ul>
039 */
040@SuppressWarnings({
041   "resource" // Writer resource managed by calling code
042})
043public class YamlWriter extends SerializerWriter {
044
045   private static final AsciiSet specialChars = AsciiSet.of(":#{}[],&*!|>'\"%@`");
046
047   // @formatter:off
048   private static final Set<String> reservedWords = new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList(
049      "null", "Null", "NULL", "~",
050      "true", "True", "TRUE",
051      "false", "False", "FALSE",
052      "yes", "Yes", "YES",
053      "no", "No", "NO",
054      "on", "On", "ON",
055      "off", "Off", "OFF",
056      ".inf", ".Inf", ".INF",
057      "-.inf", "-.Inf", "-.INF",
058      ".nan", ".NaN", ".NAN"
059   ));
060   // @formatter:on
061
062   private static final AsciiSet escapedChars = AsciiSet.of("\\\"\n\t\r\0\u0007\b\f\u001b");
063
064   /**
065    * Constructor.
066    *
067    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
068    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, tabs and spaces will be used in output.
069    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
070    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, strings will be trimmed before being serialized.
071    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver for resolving URIs to absolute or root-relative form.
072    */
073   protected YamlWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean trimStrings, UriResolver uriResolver) {
074      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, trimStrings, '"', uriResolver);
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * Writes a YAML mapping key.
079    *
080    * <p>
081    * If the key needs quoting (contains special YAML characters, starts/ends with whitespace,
082    * is empty, or is a YAML reserved word), it will be double-quoted with proper escaping.
083    * A colon-space separator is always appended after the key.
084    *
085    * @param s The key name.
086    * @return This object.
087    */
088   public YamlWriter key(String s) {
089      keyName(s);
090      w(": ");
091      return this;
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Writes just the key name portion (with quoting if necessary) but without any separator.
096    *
097    * @param s The key name.
098    * @return This object.
099    */
100   public YamlWriter keyName(String s) {
101      if (trimStrings)
102         s = trim(s);
103
104      if (s == null) {
105         w("null");
106      } else if (needsQuoting(s)) {
107         writeQuoted(s);
108      } else {
109         w(s);
110      }
111      return this;
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Writes a YAML scalar text value.
116    *
117    * <p>
118    * If null, writes the literal <c>null</c>. If the string needs quoting (is empty,
119    * looks like a boolean/null/number, contains special characters, starts/ends with whitespace,
120    * or contains newlines), it will be double-quoted with proper YAML escaping.
121    *
122    * @param s The string value.
123    * @return This object.
124    */
125   @SuppressWarnings({
126      "java:S4144" // Identical to keyName by design; distinct semantic role (value vs key quoting)
127   })
128   public YamlWriter textValue(String s) {
129      if (trimStrings)
130         s = trim(s);
131
132      if (s == null) {
133         w("null");
134      } else if (needsQuoting(s)) {
135         writeQuoted(s);
136      } else {
137         w(s);
138      }
139      return this;
140   }
141
142   /**
143    * Appends a URI value to the output.
144    *
145    * <p>
146    * Resolves the URI and writes it as a double-quoted YAML string.
147    *
148    * @param uri The URI to append to the output.
149    * @return This object.
150    */
151   public YamlWriter uriValue(Object uri) {
152      writeQuoted(uriResolver.resolve(uri));
153      return this;
154   }
155
156   /**
157    * Writes YAML block indentation.
158    *
159    * <p>
160    * Writes a newline followed by {@code depth * 2} spaces of indentation.
161    *
162    * @param depth The indentation depth.
163    * @return This object.
164    */
165   public YamlWriter yamlIndent(int depth) {
166      w('\n');
167      for (var i = 0; i < depth * 2; i++)
168         w(' ');
169      return this;
170   }
171
172   /**
173    * Writes a YAML list entry prefix.
174    *
175    * <p>
176    * Writes a newline followed by {@code depth * 2} spaces and a dash-space (<js>"- "</js>) prefix.
177    *
178    * @param depth The indentation depth.
179    * @return This object.
180    */
181   public YamlWriter listEntry(int depth) {
182      w('\n');
183      for (var i = 0; i < depth * 2; i++)
184         w(' ');
185      w("- ");
186      return this;
187   }
188
189   /**
190    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified string needs double-quoting in YAML.
191    *
192    * @param s The string to check.
193    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the string needs quoting.
194    */
195   @SuppressWarnings({
196      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for YAML quoting checks
197   })
198   private static boolean needsQuoting(String s) {
199      if (s.isEmpty())
200         return true;
201
202      if (Character.isWhitespace(s.charAt(0)) || Character.isWhitespace(s.charAt(s.length() - 1)))
203         return true;
204
205      if (reservedWords.contains(s))
206         return true;
207
208      if (looksLikeNumber(s))
209         return true;
210
211      for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
212         var c = s.charAt(i);
213         if (c == '\n' || c == '\r')
214            return true;
215         if (specialChars.contains(c))
216            return true;
217         if (escapedChars.contains(c))
218            return true;
219      }
220
221      return false;
222   }
223
224   /**
225    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the string looks like a YAML number (integer, float, hex, or octal).
226    */
227   private static boolean looksLikeNumber(String s) {
228      if (s.isEmpty())
229         return false;
230      var c0 = s.charAt(0);
231      if (c0 == '+' || c0 == '-')
232         return s.length() > 1 && isDigitOrDot(s.charAt(1));
233      if (c0 == '.')
234         return s.length() > 1 && Character.isDigit(s.charAt(1));
235      if (c0 == '0' && s.length() > 1) {
236         var c1 = s.charAt(1);
237         if (c1 == 'x' || c1 == 'X' || c1 == 'o' || c1 == 'O')
238            return true;
239      }
240      return Character.isDigit(c0);
241   }
242
243   private static boolean isDigitOrDot(char c) {
244      return Character.isDigit(c) || c == '.';
245   }
246
247   /**
248    * Writes a double-quoted YAML string with proper escaping.
249    */
250   private void writeQuoted(String s) {
251      w('"');
252      if (s != null) {
253         for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
254            var c = s.charAt(i);
255            if (escapedChars.contains(c)) {
256               switch (c) {
257                  case '\\': w('\\').w('\\'); break;
258                  case '"':  w('\\').w('"'); break;
259                  case '\n': w('\\').w('n'); break;
260                  case '\t': w('\\').w('t'); break;
261                  case '\r': w('\\').w('r'); break;
262                  case '\0': w('\\').w('0'); break;
263                  case '\u0007': w('\\').w('a'); break;
264                  case '\b': w('\\').w('b'); break;
265                  case '\f': w('\\').w('f'); break;
266                  case '\u001b': w('\\').w('e'); break;
267                  default: w(c);
268               }
269            } else {
270               w(c);
271            }
272         }
273      }
274      w('"');
275   }
276
277   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
278   // Overridden methods - return type covariance for chaining
279   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
280
281   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
282   public YamlWriter append(char c) {
283      super.append(c);
284      return this;
285   }
286
287   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
288   public YamlWriter append(char[] value) {
289      super.append(value);
290      return this;
291   }
292
293   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
294   public YamlWriter append(int indent, char c) {
295      super.append(indent, c);
296      return this;
297   }
298
299   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
300   public YamlWriter append(int indent, String text) {
301      super.append(indent, text);
302      return this;
303   }
304
305   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
306   public YamlWriter append(Object text) {
307      super.append(text);
308      return this;
309   }
310
311   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
312   public YamlWriter append(String text) {
313      super.append(text);
314      return this;
315   }
316
317   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
318   public YamlWriter appendIf(boolean b, char c) {
319      super.appendIf(b, c);
320      return this;
321   }
322
323   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
324   public YamlWriter appendIf(boolean b, String text) {
325      super.appendIf(b, text);
326      return this;
327   }
328
329   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
330   public YamlWriter appendln(int indent, String text) {
331      super.appendln(indent, text);
332      return this;
333   }
334
335   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
336   public YamlWriter appendln(String text) {
337      super.appendln(text);
338      return this;
339   }
340
341   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
342   public YamlWriter appendUri(Object value) {
343      super.appendUri(value);
344      return this;
345   }
346
347   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
348   public YamlWriter cr(int depth) {
349      super.cr(depth);
350      return this;
351   }
352
353   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
354   public YamlWriter cre(int depth) {
355      super.cre(depth);
356      return this;
357   }
358
359   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
360   public YamlWriter i(int indent) {
361      super.i(indent);
362      return this;
363   }
364
365   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
366   public YamlWriter ie(int indent) {
367      super.ie(indent);
368      return this;
369   }
370
371   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
372   public YamlWriter nl(int indent) {
373      super.nl(indent);
374      return this;
375   }
376
377   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
378   public YamlWriter nlIf(boolean flag, int indent) {
379      super.nlIf(flag, indent);
380      return this;
381   }
382
383   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
384   public YamlWriter q() {
385      super.q();
386      return this;
387   }
388
389   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
390   public YamlWriter s() {
391      super.s();
392      return this;
393   }
394
395   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
396   public YamlWriter sIf(boolean flag) {
397      super.sIf(flag);
398      return this;
399   }
400
401   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
402   public YamlWriter w(char value) {
403      super.w(value);
404      return this;
405   }
406
407   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
408   public YamlWriter w(String value) {
409      super.w(value);
410      return this;
411   }
412}
